title: erinacea pungens
intro: Erinacea pungens, also known as the prickly sage or prickly chrysanthemum, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Erinacea pungens include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures, teas, and salves, can be used to support overall health and wellness.
